name: M249 | 冲击钻
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a blue and orange color scheme. The great equalizer
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器的部分零件以蓝色和橙色的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 伟大的均衡器
